subject: CALL FOR OFFERS REMINDER | UPDATED FINANCIALS:  Whispering Hills, 446 Units, Omaha, Nebraska
text: Rare Institutional Scale with Proven Value-Add Upside (https://multifamily.cushwake.com/Listings/32023?RUID=23b23b32-ce21-4bc1-9f80-a73898dce6a8) Hiren, The Cushman & Wakefield Midwest Multifamily Advisory Group is pleased to present the exclusive listing of the 446-unit Whispering Hills apartment community located in Omaha, Douglas County, Nebraska. Whispering Hills presents a compelling opportunity to acquire a 446-unit, institutional-quality multifamily community in the high-barrier Omaha MSA, offering immediate scale in a market where large acquisitions are increasingly difficult to replicate. Delivered in phases between 2004 and 2016, the asset is currently 97% occupied with a three-year average of 95.3%, demonstrating consistent demand and operational stability. Rent growth further reinforces performance, with effective rents increasing 13.0% since 2023 and continuing to trend upward, supported by Omaha’s resilient fundamentals, limited new supply, and strong absorption—particularly within the highly sought-after West Omaha submarket. Strategically located near major employment corridors, retail amenities, and affluent residential neighborhoods, Whispering Hills benefits from durable renter demand and long-term income stability. In addition to its stabilized cash flow, the asset offers attractive value-add upside, with renovated units already achieving premiums of approximately $118 as of June 9th rent roll comparing average in-place of fully renovated to unrenovated units, providing a clear path for continued revenue growth. Combined with its low-density site and positioning at a meaningful discount to replacement cost, the opportunity offers investors a rare combination of scale, stability, and embedded upside in an irreplaceable location. CALL FOR OFFERS: Tuesday, July 21st *TOURS AVAILABLE: July 14th - July 16th **NEW FINANCIALS AVAILABLE** Execute The Ca (https://multifamily.cushwake.com/Listings/32023?RUID=23b23b32-ce21-4bc1-9f80-a73898dce6a8) (https://multifamily.cushwake.com/Listings/32023?RUID=23b23b32-ce21-4bc1-9f80-a73898dce6a8) Thank you for your interest, Cushman & Wakefield Midwest Multifamily Advisory Group 4600 Madison Avenue, Suite 800 Kansas City, MO 64112 You received this e-mail because you are signed up to get property listing notifications, market updates, and other communications from multifamily.cushwake.com (https://multifamily.cushwake.com/?RUID=23b23b32-ce21-4bc1-9f80-a73898dce6a8). html:
Rare Institutional Scale with Proven Value-Add Upside

Hiren,

The Cushman & Wakefield Midwest Multifamily Advisory Group is pleased to present the exclusive listing of the 446-unit Whispering Hills apartment community located in Omaha, Douglas County, Nebraska. Whispering Hills presents a compelling opportunity to acquire a 446-unit, institutional-quality multifamily community in the high-barrier Omaha MSA, offering immediate scale in a market where large acquisitions are increasingly difficult to replicate. Delivered in phases between 2004 and 2016, the asset is currently 97% occupied with a three-year average of 95.3%, demonstrating consistent demand and operational stability. Rent growth further reinforces performance, with effective rents increasing 13.0% since 2023 and continuing to trend upward, supported by Omaha’s resilient fundamentals, limited new supply, and strong absorption—particularly within the highly sought-after West Omaha submarket.

Strategically located near major employment corridors, retail amenities, and affluent residential neighborhoods, Whispering Hills benefits from durable renter demand and long-term income stability. In addition to its stabilized cash flow, the asset offers attractive value-add upside, with renovated units already achieving premiums of approximately $118 as of June 9th rent roll comparing average in-place of fully renovated to unrenovated units, providing a clear path for continued revenue growth. Combined with its low-density site and positioning at a meaningful discount to replacement cost, the opportunity offers investors a rare combination of scale, stability, and embedded upside in an irreplaceable location. 

CALL FOR OFFERS: Tuesday, July 21st 

*TOURS AVAILABLE: July 14th - July 16th

**NEW FINANCIALS AVAILABLE**

 


Execute The Ca
 

 
 

Thank you for your interest,

Cushman & Wakefield
Midwest Multifamily Advisory Group
4600 Madison Avenue, Suite 800
Kansas City, MO 64112
